title: leptaulus citrioides
intro: Leptaulus citrioides, also known as the 'citrus-leaved sage', is a flowering plant native to Asia. It possesses various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which contribute to its numerous health benefits. The plant is traditionally used to treat various ailments, such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as to alleviate symptoms of the common cold and flu. Leptaulus citrioides is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
